params.name: St. Louisa Goblet
params.description:
On Jan 7, 1661 AD, a kind of very luxurious goblet was put into production.
Right after King Louis XIV of France acceded to the throne, he used royal assets to buy more than 20 glass manufacturers. And one of them was St. Louis. When Louis XV took over the reign, St. Louis was awarded the title of Royal Glassworks. Its exquisite crystal craftsmanship, clarity, and thermal conductivity are superior, but what is most impressive is the crystal luster and its mesmerizing chime. Hand-made glasswor …
